tool_use_result.originalFile:
{
  "sections": {
    "Hook": [
      {
        "id": "scene_001",
        "start": "0:00",
        "duration": "4s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Venezuela.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Bold typographic title card: the single word \"VENEZUELA\" rendered in a clean editorial sans-serif, white on a deep cinematic gradient. No motion graphics; a held essay-documentary opener.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "VENEZUELA"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_002",
        "start": "0:04",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "It's a land of incredible beauty—filled with cascading waterfalls, vibrant rainforests, and sun-drenched coastlines.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Sweeping aerials and slow ground footage of Venezuelan landscape: Angel Falls / cascading waterfalls, lush rainforest canopy, and sun-drenched Caribbean coastline. Color-graded warm and cinematic.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela aerial waterfalls Angel Falls rainforest coastline landscape beauty",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_003",
        "start": "0:11",
        "duration": "5s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But these idyllic images are constantly colliding with a much darker reality.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Hard-cut transition into present-day Caracas street life: worn buildings, weary pedestrians, graffiti, smoky urban air. Cooler grade than the previous beat.",
        "search_query": "Caracas Venezuela street life poverty urban decay daily struggle",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_004",
        "start": "0:16",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "We're talking about widespread poverty, political unrest, and a nation that seems to be perpetually on the brink.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a cracked, weathered Venezuelan flag fluttering against a smoke-tinged sky over a darkened Caracas skyline. Photorealistic, cinematic — establishes the 'on the brink' motif without depicting any specific named figures.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic wide shot of a weathered, cracked Venezuelan flag (yellow blue red with the eight stars and coat of arms) fluttering in dramatic side light against a smoky overcast sky, silhouetted darkened Caracas skyline below with the Avila mountain in the distance, melancholy mood, documentary color grade, no people, no text, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_005",
        "start": "0:22",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Listen to what Maria Rodriguez, a resident of Caracas, said recently: “We are tired. Tired of the empty promises, the shortages, and the constant struggle just to survive.”",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Pull-quote treatment over softly defocused Caracas b-roll background. Quote rendered in clean editorial typography with attribution lower-third: 'Maria Rodriguez — Caracas resident'. Text fades in word-by-word; no decorative motion. The script's only civilian voice — do not reuse later.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "pull_quote",
          "params": {
            "quote": "We are tired. Tired of the empty promises, the shortages, and the constant struggle just to survive.",
            "attribution": "Maria Rodriguez — Caracas resident",
            "highlight_words": ["tired", "empty promises", "struggle"]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_006",
        "start": "0:31",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "And here's the most shocking part: all of this is happening in a country sitting on top of one of the world's largest oil reserves.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Wide shots of Venezuelan oil infrastructure: pumpjacks, refineries on Lake Maracaibo, flare stacks at dusk, oil tankers. Industrial scale conveyed with slow push-ins.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela oil infrastructure refinery Lake Maracaibo pumpjack petroleum industry",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_007",
        "start": "0:37",
        "duration": "5s",
        "narration_excerpt": "In theory, that resource should guarantee prosperity for everyone.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Animated information graphic: a horizontal bar chart of the world's top proven crude-oil reserves by country, with Venezuela's bar highlighted at the top. Clean editorial typography, neutral palette, source citation in small caps.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "ranking",
          "params": {
            "title": "World's Largest Proven Crude-Oil Reserves",
            "items": [
              ["Venezuela", "#1"],
              ["Saudi Arabia", "#2"],
              ["Canada", "#3"],
              ["Iran", "#4"],
              ["Iraq", "#5"]
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_008",
        "start": "0:42",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "So, how did this happen? How did a nation with so much wealth become so fractured?",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Quick montage juxtaposing Caracas wealth and poverty: a luxury high-rise dissolves into a hillside barrio, a glittering plaza next to a shuttered shop. Tight cuts; the question hangs visually.",
        "search_query": "Caracas wealth poverty contrast barrio high rise inequality split screen",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_009",
        "start": "0:48",
        "duration": "4s",
        "narration_excerpt": "That's exactly what we're going to explore today.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Editorial theme card: 'A Country Divided' with subtitle 'How Venezuela's wealth became its fracture'. Clean typographic transition into the Context section. No decorative motion.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "A Country Divided",
            "subtitle": "How Venezuela's wealth became its fracture"
          }
        }
      }
    ],
    "Context": [
      {
        "id": "scene_010",
        "start": "0:52",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "To really understand the complexities of modern Venezuela, we first need to look back at its history.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Section marker: a horizontal timeline graphic spanning 'Pre-Columbian → 2024' appears as a thin spine across screen, with the section title 'Context' set above it. The timeline will be progressively populated through later sections.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "Context",
            "events": [
              {"year": "Pre-Columbian", "label": "Indigenous societies"},
              {"year": "1500s", "label": "Spanish colonization"},
              {"year": "1821", "label": "Independence"},
              {"year": "1900s", "label": "Oil discovery"},
              {"year": "2024", "label": "Today"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_011",
        "start": "0:59",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Long before Europeans arrived, the land was home to many diverse indigenous groups. In the west, the Arawak people settled the region, while the Carib dominated the east.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Animated map of Venezuela: the western region shades in to label 'Arawak', the eastern region shades in to label 'Carib'. Coastline, the Orinoco, and Lake Maracaibo subtly drawn. Editorial cartography, muted earth tones.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "custom",
          "params": {
            "description": "Animated map of Venezuela showing the Arawak (west) and Carib (east) territorial split, with Orinoco river and Lake Maracaibo annotated. Muted earth-tone editorial cartography.",
            "regions": [
              {"name": "Arawak", "side": "west"},
              {"name": "Carib", "side": "east"}
            ],
            "note": "no built-in template — needs custom render or replan as image"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_012",
        "start": "1:07",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "These societies had their own distinct languages and traditions, and their farming practices shaped the landscape long before the modern era.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal historical reconstruction: pre-Columbian Arawak / Carib villagers tending terraced cassava and maize plots at the edge of a tropical riverbank. No anachronisms; respectful, observational framing.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic historical reconstruction of a pre-Columbian indigenous Arawak village in what is now Venezuela, families tending terraced cassava and maize plots on a riverbank near tropical forest, traditional thatched dwellings, soft golden hour light, observational wide shot, 35mm documentary aesthetic, no text, respectful and dignified framing"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_013",
        "start": "1:15",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But everything changed with the arrival of Spanish colonizers.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal period image: Spanish galleons anchored off the Venezuelan coast in the early 16th century, conquistadors disembarking onto the shore. Painterly cinematic light, ominous tone.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic period painting style, early 16th century Spanish galleons anchored off the Venezuelan Caribbean coast, conquistadors in steel cuirass and morion helmets disembarking onto a sand beach, palm trees and tropical mountains in the distance, overcast moody sky, ominous tone, oil painting realism, 35mm wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_014",
        "start": "1:22",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "After centuries of colonial rule, a spirit of independence began to sweep across South America.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Timeline graphic advances: a sweep from 1500s colonial Spain through the early 1800s, with country labels igniting one by one across South America to mark the independence wave. Editorial illustrative style.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "Independence Sweeps South America",
            "events": [
              {"year": "1500s", "label": "Spanish colonial rule"},
              {"year": "1810", "label": "Independence movements begin"},
              {"year": "1820s", "label": "Independence wave across South America"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_015",
        "start": "1:30",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Venezuela became a central player in that fight, led by the legendary Simón Bolívar.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal period portrait of Simón Bolívar in early-1820s military dress, set against a backdrop of his Andean campaign. Lower-third orientation card: 'Simón Bolívar — Liberator who led the independence campaigns of the 1810s–20s'.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic period portrait of Simón Bolívar in early 19th century military dress uniform with high collar and gold epaulets, holding a sabre, set against a backdrop of misty Andean mountains and his independence campaign, oil painting realism, dramatic side lighting, dignified heroic but historically accurate, 50mm portrait, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_016",
        "start": "1:39",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "After years of intense struggle, the country officially declared its independence from Spain in 1821, forever cementing Bolívar as a national hero.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal historical battle image: the 1821 Battle of Carabobo — Venezuelan patriot cavalry charging across an open plain, banners aloft. Painterly cinematic, smoke-streaked light.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic historical battle painting, 1821 Battle of Carabobo, Venezuelan patriot cavalry in early 19th century uniforms charging across an open llanos plain with the tricolor flag aloft, smoke and dust streaked light, distant Spanish royalist lines, painterly oil realism, dramatic wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_017",
        "start": "1:48",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Independence promised a new beginning, but the nation's path was about to be reshaped by a new economic reality.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Timeline graphic plants a milestone marker '1821 — Independence' on the spine, then the line advances into the late 19th and early 20th centuries while a small oil-derrick icon appears at the far right, hinting at what's coming.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "From Independence to Oil",
            "events": [
              {"year": "1821", "label": "Independence"},
              {"year": "Late 1800s", "label": "Agrarian republic"},
              {"year": "Early 1900s", "label": "Oil discovery looms"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_018",
        "start": "1:55",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "In the early 20th century, Venezuela's story took a dramatic turn. The discovery of massive oil reserves transformed the country from a simple farming society into an economy almost entirely dependent on petroleum exports.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal early-20th-century scene: the first wooden derricks rising over Lake Maracaibo, sepia-tinged with workers in period dress watching the first gusher. Painterly documentary realism.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic early 20th century historical image of the first wooden oil derricks rising over Lake Maracaibo Venezuela circa 1920s, oil workers in period work clothes watching a gusher, sepia warm color grade, painterly documentary realism, wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_019",
        "start": "2:04",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "While this shift initially brought a lot of wealth, it also created the very challenges that would define Venezuela's future.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Modern footage of Venezuelan refineries and pipeline corridors: industrial scale, golden hour, the country's economic spine made visible.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela oil refinery pipeline industrial petroleum economy infrastructure aerial",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_020",
        "start": "2:11",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Eventually, this one commodity would come to influence almost every part of life in the country.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",

        "narration_excerpt": "We saw figures like Juan Guaidó emerge, claiming the presidency and gaining recognition from several international powers.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Orientation card: 'Juan Guaidó — opposition leader who declared himself acting president in 2019, recognized by ~50 governments'. Plain editorial typography held over a softly defocused crowd background. Serves the orientation rule for first mention.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "lower_third",
          "params": {
            "name": "Juan Guaidó",
            "title": "Opposition leader · declared himself acting president in 2019, recognized by ~50 governments"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_058",
        "start": "7:51",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But instead of a solution, this only deepened the chasm within the country.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Library footage of competing rallies in Caracas: pro-government red shirts on one side of the city, opposition white shirts on the other, intercut on a steady rhythm. The chasm made literal.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela opposition rally pro government rally Caracas competing protest 2019 chavismo",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_059",
        "start": "7:59",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But here's the key insight: the real accelerant for all this disunity was the deep-seated corruption that plagued one government after another.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Cadence card. Header: 'KEY INSIGHT'. Body: 'Corruption was the accelerant.' Held over a softly defocused archival background. Third of the four 'key insight' beats.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "KEY INSIGHT",
            "subtitle": "Corruption was the accelerant."
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_060",
        "start": "8:06",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "There was a growing reality that officials were getting rich while the rest of the country suffered, and that ignited a powerful sense of resentment. It created a stark divide between those who benefited from government connections and those who were left to struggle.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a polished marble government corridor where a briefcase opens to reveal stacks of US dollars, with a long shadow of an ordinary citizen waiting at the corridor's far end. Cinematic photoreal, no specific likenesses.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic symbolic composition, a polished marble government corridor with classical columns, in the foreground a black leather briefcase opens on a desk to reveal neat stacks of US one hundred dollar bills, at the far end of the corridor the long shadow of a single ordinary citizen waiting, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, painterly editorial realism, no faces visible, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_061",
        "start": "8:13",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "In the end, this environment of corruption, combined with the economic crisis, didn't just hurt the country—it completely tore the social fabric of Venezuela apart.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a Venezuelan flag rendered as a woven fabric being torn down its center, threads pulling apart. Cinematic photoreal, restrained, no caricature.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic symbolic composition, a Venezuelan tricolor flag rendered as a woven textile being torn down its vertical center, individual threads stretching and snapping, dark editorial background, dramatic side light, macro detail, painterly realism, no text, no people"
      }
    ],
    "Conclusion": [
      {
        "id": "scene_062",
        "start": "8:19",
        "duration": "5s",
        "narration_excerpt": "So, we've taken a look at the deep divisions within Venezuelan society.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Section marker card: 'Conclusion' in editorial serif over a slowly defocused Caracas skyline. Holds a beat to signal the section turn.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_063",
        "start": "8:24",
        "duration": "11s",
        "narration_excerpt": "It's a stark contrast, especially when you consider the nation's incredible natural wealth.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Slow montage echoing the Hook: waterfalls and rainforests dissolving into Caracas barrios and queues. The opening contrast restated, now with the case made.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela natural beauty waterfall rainforest Caracas barrio contrast wealth poverty",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_064",
        "start": "8:35",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "We've explored three main reasons why this happened.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Three-lens recap card returns: '1 — Colonial Legacy & the Caudillos', '2 — The Oil Trap', '3 — Political Fragmentation' all visible together. Same typographic system as the Thesis preview, signalling closure of the structure.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_065",
        "start": "8:41",
        "duration": "11s",
        "narration_excerpt": "First, there's the legacy of colonialism and the era of the \"caudillos.\" That history created a pattern of instability and inequality that still resonates today.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Lens-1 callback: a brief return to the caudillo-on-horseback motif, color-graded slightly cooler now to feel like memory rather than narrative present. Painterly photoreal.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic 19th century historical scene, a Venezuelan caudillo regional strongman on horseback silhouetted against a hazy llanos plain at twilight, dust trail behind, painterly oil realism with a slightly cool desaturated memory grade, dramatic wide shot, generic figure not a specific likeness, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_066",
        "start": "8:52",
        "duration": "11s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Second, the country's reliance on oil—which seemed like a blessing at first—actually made the economy vulnerable and made existing social gaps even wider.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Lens-2 callback: the oil-price chart returns at full span (1970–2024), with the 1973 boom, 1980s crash, and 2014 collapse all annotated together. Editorial data design.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_067",
        "start": "9:03",
        "duration": "10s",
        "narration_excerpt": "And finally, there's the political fragmentation. Competing ideologies and widespread corruption have only pushed people further apart.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Lens-3 callback: a tight montage of competing Caracas rallies and shuttered government buildings, intercut on a slow rhythm. Balanced framing across the political divide.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela competing rally opposition government Caracas political divide protest fragmentation",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_068",
        "start": "9:13",
        "duration": "13s",
        "narration_excerpt": "When you put it all together, Venezuela's story is really about unfulfilled potential. A mix of history, flawed policies, and conflicting ideologies have created a divided society, despite all those resources. Now, overcoming these divisions and finding true stability is a daunting task. It's not going to be easy.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: an oil derrick and a school building stand on opposite sides of a fissure that runs through a Venezuelan landscape, the fissure narrowing toward the horizon — the gap that could yet be closed. Cinematic photoreal, restrained, no caricature.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic symbolic composition, a stark Venezuelan landscape at golden hour, on the left side a working oil derrick, on the right side a small school building, between them a deep fissure runs through the earth narrowing toward the distant horizon, melancholy hopeful tone, painterly editorial realism, wide shot, no text, no people"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_069",
        "start": "9:26",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But here's the key insight: understanding these complexities is the first step toward finding a way forward.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Cadence card. Header: 'KEY INSIGHT'. Body: 'Understanding is the first step forward.' Held over a soft warm-graded background. Final of the four 'key insight' beats.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_070",
        "start": "9:35",
        "duration": "15s",
        "narration_excerpt": "I encourage you to dig deeper into the history and culture of this fascinating country. Look for different perspectives and stay informed. We can all advocate for policies that focus on dialogue, reconciliation, and sustainable growth. By educating ourselves and taking action, we can contribute to a future where Venezuela finally reaches its potential—a future where its people can truly thrive in unity and prosperity.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Held closing image (12–15s as required by the closing-image rule): a slow montage of ordinary Venezuelans — children at a community center, neighbors talking on a Caracas stoop, market vendors at dawn — ending on a wide held shot of a sunrise over the Caracas valley. Hopeful, observational, no captions or commentary on screen.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela everyday life community children neighbors market vendor Caracas sunrise hopeful future",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      }
    ]
  }
}

tool_use_result.originalFile:
{
  "sections": {
    "Hook": [
      {
        "id": "scene_001",
        "start": "0:00",
        "duration": "4s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Venezuela.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Bold typographic title card: the single word \"VENEZUELA\" rendered in a clean editorial sans-serif, white on a deep cinematic gradient. No motion graphics; a held essay-documentary opener.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "VENEZUELA"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_002",
        "start": "0:04",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "It's a land of incredible beauty—filled with cascading waterfalls, vibrant rainforests, and sun-drenched coastlines.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Sweeping aerials and slow ground footage of Venezuelan landscape: Angel Falls / cascading waterfalls, lush rainforest canopy, and sun-drenched Caribbean coastline. Color-graded warm and cinematic.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela aerial waterfalls Angel Falls rainforest coastline landscape beauty",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_003",
        "start": "0:11",
        "duration": "5s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But these idyllic images are constantly colliding with a much darker reality.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Hard-cut transition into present-day Caracas street life: worn buildings, weary pedestrians, graffiti, smoky urban air. Cooler grade than the previous beat.",
        "search_query": "Caracas Venezuela street life poverty urban decay daily struggle",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_004",
        "start": "0:16",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "We're talking about widespread poverty, political unrest, and a nation that seems to be perpetually on the brink.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a cracked, weathered Venezuelan flag fluttering against a smoke-tinged sky over a darkened Caracas skyline. Photorealistic, cinematic — establishes the 'on the brink' motif without depicting any specific named figures.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic wide shot of a weathered, cracked Venezuelan flag (yellow blue red with the eight stars and coat of arms) fluttering in dramatic side light against a smoky overcast sky, silhouetted darkened Caracas skyline below with the Avila mountain in the distance, melancholy mood, documentary color grade, no people, no text, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_005",
        "start": "0:22",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Listen to what Maria Rodriguez, a resident of Caracas, said recently: “We are tired. Tired of the empty promises, the shortages, and the constant struggle just to survive.”",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Pull-quote treatment over softly defocused Caracas b-roll background. Quote rendered in clean editorial typography with attribution lower-third: 'Maria Rodriguez — Caracas resident'. Text fades in word-by-word; no decorative motion. The script's only civilian voice — do not reuse later.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "pull_quote",
          "params": {
            "quote": "We are tired. Tired of the empty promises, the shortages, and the constant struggle just to survive.",
            "attribution": "Maria Rodriguez — Caracas resident",
            "highlight_words": ["tired", "empty promises", "struggle"]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_006",
        "start": "0:31",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "And here's the most shocking part: all of this is happening in a country sitting on top of one of the world's largest oil reserves.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Wide shots of Venezuelan oil infrastructure: pumpjacks, refineries on Lake Maracaibo, flare stacks at dusk, oil tankers. Industrial scale conveyed with slow push-ins.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela oil infrastructure refinery Lake Maracaibo pumpjack petroleum industry",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_007",
        "start": "0:37",
        "duration": "5s",
        "narration_excerpt": "In theory, that resource should guarantee prosperity for everyone.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Animated information graphic: a horizontal bar chart of the world's top proven crude-oil reserves by country, with Venezuela's bar highlighted at the top. Clean editorial typography, neutral palette, source citation in small caps.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "ranking",
          "params": {
            "title": "World's Largest Proven Crude-Oil Reserves",
            "items": [
              ["Venezuela", "#1"],
              ["Saudi Arabia", "#2"],
              ["Canada", "#3"],
              ["Iran", "#4"],
              ["Iraq", "#5"]
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_008",
        "start": "0:42",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "So, how did this happen? How did a nation with so much wealth become so fractured?",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Quick montage juxtaposing Caracas wealth and poverty: a luxury high-rise dissolves into a hillside barrio, a glittering plaza next to a shuttered shop. Tight cuts; the question hangs visually.",
        "search_query": "Caracas wealth poverty contrast barrio high rise inequality split screen",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_009",
        "start": "0:48",
        "duration": "4s",
        "narration_excerpt": "That's exactly what we're going to explore today.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Editorial theme card: 'A Country Divided' with subtitle 'How Venezuela's wealth became its fracture'. Clean typographic transition into the Context section. No decorative motion.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "A Country Divided",
            "subtitle": "How Venezuela's wealth became its fracture"
          }
        }
      }
    ],
    "Context": [
      {
        "id": "scene_010",
        "start": "0:52",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "To really understand the complexities of modern Venezuela, we first need to look back at its history.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Section marker: a horizontal timeline graphic spanning 'Pre-Columbian → 2024' appears as a thin spine across screen, with the section title 'Context' set above it. The timeline will be progressively populated through later sections.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "Context",
            "events": [
              {"year": "Pre-Columbian", "label": "Indigenous societies"},
              {"year": "1500s", "label": "Spanish colonization"},
              {"year": "1821", "label": "Independence"},
              {"year": "1900s", "label": "Oil discovery"},
              {"year": "2024", "label": "Today"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_011",
        "start": "0:59",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Long before Europeans arrived, the land was home to many diverse indigenous groups. In the west, the Arawak people settled the region, while the Carib dominated the east.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Animated map of Venezuela: the western region shades in to label 'Arawak', the eastern region shades in to label 'Carib'. Coastline, the Orinoco, and Lake Maracaibo subtly drawn. Editorial cartography, muted earth tones.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "custom",
          "params": {
            "description": "Animated map of Venezuela showing the Arawak (west) and Carib (east) territorial split, with Orinoco river and Lake Maracaibo annotated. Muted earth-tone editorial cartography.",
            "regions": [
              {"name": "Arawak", "side": "west"},
              {"name": "Carib", "side": "east"}
            ],
            "note": "no built-in template — needs custom render or replan as image"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_012",
        "start": "1:07",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "These societies had their own distinct languages and traditions, and their farming practices shaped the landscape long before the modern era.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal historical reconstruction: pre-Columbian Arawak / Carib villagers tending terraced cassava and maize plots at the edge of a tropical riverbank. No anachronisms; respectful, observational framing.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic historical reconstruction of a pre-Columbian indigenous Arawak village in what is now Venezuela, families tending terraced cassava and maize plots on a riverbank near tropical forest, traditional thatched dwellings, soft golden hour light, observational wide shot, 35mm documentary aesthetic, no text, respectful and dignified framing"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_013",
        "start": "1:15",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But everything changed with the arrival of Spanish colonizers.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal period image: Spanish galleons anchored off the Venezuelan coast in the early 16th century, conquistadors disembarking onto the shore. Painterly cinematic light, ominous tone.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic period painting style, early 16th century Spanish galleons anchored off the Venezuelan Caribbean coast, conquistadors in steel cuirass and morion helmets disembarking onto a sand beach, palm trees and tropical mountains in the distance, overcast moody sky, ominous tone, oil painting realism, 35mm wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_014",
        "start": "1:22",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "After centuries of colonial rule, a spirit of independence began to sweep across South America.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Timeline graphic advances: a sweep from 1500s colonial Spain through the early 1800s, with country labels igniting one by one across South America to mark the independence wave. Editorial illustrative style.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "Independence Sweeps South America",
            "events": [
              {"year": "1500s", "label": "Spanish colonial rule"},
              {"year": "1810", "label": "Independence movements begin"},
              {"year": "1820s", "label": "Independence wave across South America"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_015",
        "start": "1:30",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Venezuela became a central player in that fight, led by the legendary Simón Bolívar.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal period portrait of Simón Bolívar in early-1820s military dress, set against a backdrop of his Andean campaign. Lower-third orientation card: 'Simón Bolívar — Liberator who led the independence campaigns of the 1810s–20s'.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic period portrait of Simón Bolívar in early 19th century military dress uniform with high collar and gold epaulets, holding a sabre, set against a backdrop of misty Andean mountains and his independence campaign, oil painting realism, dramatic side lighting, dignified heroic but historically accurate, 50mm portrait, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_016",
        "start": "1:39",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "After years of intense struggle, the country officially declared its independence from Spain in 1821, forever cementing Bolívar as a national hero.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal historical battle image: the 1821 Battle of Carabobo — Venezuelan patriot cavalry charging across an open plain, banners aloft. Painterly cinematic, smoke-streaked light.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic historical battle painting, 1821 Battle of Carabobo, Venezuelan patriot cavalry in early 19th century uniforms charging across an open llanos plain with the tricolor flag aloft, smoke and dust streaked light, distant Spanish royalist lines, painterly oil realism, dramatic wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_017",
        "start": "1:48",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Independence promised a new beginning, but the nation's path was about to be reshaped by a new economic reality.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Timeline graphic plants a milestone marker '1821 — Independence' on the spine, then the line advances into the late 19th and early 20th centuries while a small oil-derrick icon appears at the far right, hinting at what's coming.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "From Independence to Oil",
            "events": [
              {"year": "1821", "label": "Independence"},
              {"year": "Late 1800s", "label": "Agrarian republic"},
              {"year": "Early 1900s", "label": "Oil discovery looms"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_018",
        "start": "1:55",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "In the early 20th century, Venezuela's story took a dramatic turn. The discovery of massive oil reserves transformed the country from a simple farming society into an economy almost entirely dependent on petroleum exports.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal early-20th-century scene: the first wooden derricks rising over Lake Maracaibo, sepia-tinged with workers in period dress watching the first gusher. Painterly documentary realism.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic early 20th century historical image of the first wooden oil derricks rising over Lake Maracaibo Venezuela circa 1920s, oil workers in period work clothes watching a gusher, sepia warm color grade, painterly documentary realism, wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_019",
        "start": "2:04",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "While this shift initially brought a lot of wealth, it also created the very challenges that would define Venezuela's future.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Modern footage of Venezuelan refineries and pipeline corridors: industrial scale, golden hour, the country's economic spine made visible.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela oil refinery pipeline industrial petroleum economy infrastructure aerial",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_020",
        "start": "2:11",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Eventually, this one commodity would come to influence almost every part of life in the country.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Caracas everyday life intercut with oil-economy markers: gas stations, fuel-subsidy queues, workers' boots on refinery floors — oil's reach into ordinary life.",
        "search_query": "Caracas daily life gas station fuel subsidy oil dependent economy Venezuela",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      }
    ],
    "Thesis": [
      {
        "id": "scene_021",
        "start": "2:18",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "On paper, Venezuela should be incredibly wealthy.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a tilting oil derrick towering over a Caracas skyline, the structure casting a long shadow that splits the city into two unequal halves. Cinematic, photoreal, no caricature.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic symbolic composition, an oversized oil derrick tilting over a Caracas skyline at dusk, the derrick's long shadow stretching across the city and splitting it into two unequal halves of light and dark, melancholy mood, painterly editorial, wide shot, no text, no people"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_022",
        "start": "2:25",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But the reality is a society split right down the middle. In this video, we're exploring the root causes of that paradox.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Side-by-side Caracas footage: an upscale Las Mercedes street and a Petare hillside barrio, intercut at a steady rhythm. The split feels structural, not editorial.",
        "search_query": "Caracas Las Mercedes Petare barrio rich poor neighborhood divide inequality",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },

        "visual_description": "Cadence card. Header: 'KEY INSIGHT'. Body: 'Corruption was the accelerant.' Held over a softly defocused archival background. Third of the four 'key insight' beats.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "KEY INSIGHT",
            "subtitle": "Corruption was the accelerant."
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_060",
        "start": "8:06",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "There was a growing reality that officials were getting rich while the rest of the country suffered, and that ignited a powerful sense of resentment. It created a stark divide between those who benefited from government connections and those who were left to struggle.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a polished marble government corridor where a briefcase opens to reveal stacks of US dollars, with a long shadow of an ordinary citizen waiting at the corridor's far end. Cinematic photoreal, no specific likenesses.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic symbolic composition, a polished marble government corridor with classical columns, in the foreground a black leather briefcase opens on a desk to reveal neat stacks of US one hundred dollar bills, at the far end of the corridor the long shadow of a single ordinary citizen waiting, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, painterly editorial realism, no faces visible, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_061",
        "start": "8:13",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "In the end, this environment of corruption, combined with the economic crisis, didn't just hurt the country—it completely tore the social fabric of Venezuela apart.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a Venezuelan flag rendered as a woven fabric being torn down its center, threads pulling apart. Cinematic photoreal, restrained, no caricature.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic symbolic composition, a Venezuelan tricolor flag rendered as a woven textile being torn down its vertical center, individual threads stretching and snapping, dark editorial background, dramatic side light, macro detail, painterly realism, no text, no people"
      }
    ],
    "Conclusion": [
      {
        "id": "scene_062",
        "start": "8:19",
        "duration": "5s",
        "narration_excerpt": "So, we've taken a look at the deep divisions within Venezuelan society.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Section marker card: 'Conclusion' in editorial serif over a slowly defocused Caracas skyline. Holds a beat to signal the section turn.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "section_divider",
          "params": {
            "title": "Conclusion"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_063",
        "start": "8:24",
        "duration": "11s",
        "narration_excerpt": "It's a stark contrast, especially when you consider the nation's incredible natural wealth.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Slow montage echoing the Hook: waterfalls and rainforests dissolving into Caracas barrios and queues. The opening contrast restated, now with the case made.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela natural beauty waterfall rainforest Caracas barrio contrast wealth poverty",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_064",
        "start": "8:35",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "We've explored three main reasons why this happened.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Three-lens recap card returns: '1 — Colonial Legacy & the Caudillos', '2 — The Oil Trap', '3 — Political Fragmentation' all visible together. Same typographic system as the Thesis preview, signalling closure of the structure.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_065",
        "start": "8:41",
        "duration": "11s",
        "narration_excerpt": "First, there's the legacy of colonialism and the era of the \"caudillos.\" That history created a pattern of instability and inequality that still resonates today.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Lens-1 callback: a brief return to the caudillo-on-horseback motif, color-graded slightly cooler now to feel like memory rather than narrative present. Painterly photoreal.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic 19th century historical scene, a Venezuelan caudillo regional strongman on horseback silhouetted against a hazy llanos plain at twilight, dust trail behind, painterly oil realism with a slightly cool desaturated memory grade, dramatic wide shot, generic figure not a specific likeness, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_066",
        "start": "8:52",
        "duration": "11s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Second, the country's reliance on oil—which seemed like a blessing at first—actually made the economy vulnerable and made existing social gaps even wider.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Lens-2 callback: the oil-price chart returns at full span (1970–2024), with the 1973 boom, 1980s crash, and 2014 collapse all annotated together. Editorial data design.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_067",
        "start": "9:03",
        "duration": "10s",
        "narration_excerpt": "And finally, there's the political fragmentation. Competing ideologies and widespread corruption have only pushed people further apart.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Lens-3 callback: a tight montage of competing Caracas rallies and shuttered government buildings, intercut on a slow rhythm. Balanced framing across the political divide.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela competing rally opposition government Caracas political divide protest fragmentation",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_068",
        "start": "9:13",
        "duration": "13s",
        "narration_excerpt": "When you put it all together, Venezuela's story is really about unfulfilled potential. A mix of history, flawed policies, and conflicting ideologies have created a divided society, despite all those resources. Now, overcoming these divisions and finding true stability is a daunting task. It's not going to be easy.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: an oil derrick and a school building stand on opposite sides of a fissure that runs through a Venezuelan landscape, the fissure narrowing toward the horizon — the gap that could yet be closed. Cinematic photoreal, restrained, no caricature.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic symbolic composition, a stark Venezuelan landscape at golden hour, on the left side a working oil derrick, on the right side a small school building, between them a deep fissure runs through the earth narrowing toward the distant horizon, melancholy hopeful tone, painterly editorial realism, wide shot, no text, no people"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_069",
        "start": "9:26",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But here's the key insight: understanding these complexities is the first step toward finding a way forward.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Cadence card. Header: 'KEY INSIGHT'. Body: 'Understanding is the first step forward.' Held over a soft warm-graded background. Final of the four 'key insight' beats.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_070",
        "start": "9:35",
        "duration": "15s",
        "narration_excerpt": "I encourage you to dig deeper into the history and culture of this fascinating country. Look for different perspectives and stay informed. We can all advocate for policies that focus on dialogue, reconciliation, and sustainable growth. By educating ourselves and taking action, we can contribute to a future where Venezuela finally reaches its potential—a future where its people can truly thrive in unity and prosperity.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Held closing image (12–15s as required by the closing-image rule): a slow montage of ordinary Venezuelans — children at a community center, neighbors talking on a Caracas stoop, market vendors at dawn — ending on a wide held shot of a sunrise over the Caracas valley. Hopeful, observational, no captions or commentary on screen.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela everyday life community children neighbors market vendor Caracas sunrise hopeful future",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      }
    ]
  }
}

tool_use_result.originalFile:
{
  "sections": {
    "Hook": [
      {
        "id": "scene_001",
        "start": "0:00",
        "duration": "4s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Venezuela.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Bold typographic title card: the single word \"VENEZUELA\" rendered in a clean editorial sans-serif, white on a deep cinematic gradient. No motion graphics; a held essay-documentary opener.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "VENEZUELA"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_002",
        "start": "0:04",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "It's a land of incredible beauty—filled with cascading waterfalls, vibrant rainforests, and sun-drenched coastlines.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Sweeping aerials and slow ground footage of Venezuelan landscape: Angel Falls / cascading waterfalls, lush rainforest canopy, and sun-drenched Caribbean coastline. Color-graded warm and cinematic.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela aerial waterfalls Angel Falls rainforest coastline landscape beauty",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_003",
        "start": "0:11",
        "duration": "5s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But these idyllic images are constantly colliding with a much darker reality.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Hard-cut transition into present-day Caracas street life: worn buildings, weary pedestrians, graffiti, smoky urban air. Cooler grade than the previous beat.",
        "search_query": "Caracas Venezuela street life poverty urban decay daily struggle",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_004",
        "start": "0:16",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "We're talking about widespread poverty, political unrest, and a nation that seems to be perpetually on the brink.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a cracked, weathered Venezuelan flag fluttering against a smoke-tinged sky over a darkened Caracas skyline. Photorealistic, cinematic — establishes the 'on the brink' motif without depicting any specific named figures.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic wide shot of a weathered, cracked Venezuelan flag (yellow blue red with the eight stars and coat of arms) fluttering in dramatic side light against a smoky overcast sky, silhouetted darkened Caracas skyline below with the Avila mountain in the distance, melancholy mood, documentary color grade, no people, no text, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_005",
        "start": "0:22",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Listen to what Maria Rodriguez, a resident of Caracas, said recently: “We are tired. Tired of the empty promises, the shortages, and the constant struggle just to survive.”",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Pull-quote treatment over softly defocused Caracas b-roll background. Quote rendered in clean editorial typography with attribution lower-third: 'Maria Rodriguez — Caracas resident'. Text fades in word-by-word; no decorative motion. The script's only civilian voice — do not reuse later.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "pull_quote",
          "params": {
            "quote": "We are tired. Tired of the empty promises, the shortages, and the constant struggle just to survive.",
            "attribution": "Maria Rodriguez — Caracas resident",
            "highlight_words": ["tired", "empty promises", "struggle"]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_006",
        "start": "0:31",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "And here's the most shocking part: all of this is happening in a country sitting on top of one of the world's largest oil reserves.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Wide shots of Venezuelan oil infrastructure: pumpjacks, refineries on Lake Maracaibo, flare stacks at dusk, oil tankers. Industrial scale conveyed with slow push-ins.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela oil infrastructure refinery Lake Maracaibo pumpjack petroleum industry",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_007",
        "start": "0:37",
        "duration": "5s",
        "narration_excerpt": "In theory, that resource should guarantee prosperity for everyone.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Animated information graphic: a horizontal bar chart of the world's top proven crude-oil reserves by country, with Venezuela's bar highlighted at the top. Clean editorial typography, neutral palette, source citation in small caps.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "ranking",
          "params": {
            "title": "World's Largest Proven Crude-Oil Reserves",
            "items": [
              ["Venezuela", "#1"],
              ["Saudi Arabia", "#2"],
              ["Canada", "#3"],
              ["Iran", "#4"],
              ["Iraq", "#5"]
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_008",
        "start": "0:42",
        "duration": "6s",
        "narration_excerpt": "So, how did this happen? How did a nation with so much wealth become so fractured?",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Quick montage juxtaposing Caracas wealth and poverty: a luxury high-rise dissolves into a hillside barrio, a glittering plaza next to a shuttered shop. Tight cuts; the question hangs visually.",
        "search_query": "Caracas wealth poverty contrast barrio high rise inequality split screen",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_009",
        "start": "0:48",
        "duration": "4s",
        "narration_excerpt": "That's exactly what we're going to explore today.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Editorial theme card: 'A Country Divided' with subtitle 'How Venezuela's wealth became its fracture'. Clean typographic transition into the Context section. No decorative motion.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "A Country Divided",
            "subtitle": "How Venezuela's wealth became its fracture"
          }
        }
      }
    ],
    "Context": [
      {
        "id": "scene_010",
        "start": "0:52",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "To really understand the complexities of modern Venezuela, we first need to look back at its history.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Section marker: a horizontal timeline graphic spanning 'Pre-Columbian → 2024' appears as a thin spine across screen, with the section title 'Context' set above it. The timeline will be progressively populated through later sections.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "Context",
            "events": [
              {"year": "Pre-Columbian", "label": "Indigenous societies"},
              {"year": "1500s", "label": "Spanish colonization"},
              {"year": "1821", "label": "Independence"},
              {"year": "1900s", "label": "Oil discovery"},
              {"year": "2024", "label": "Today"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_011",
        "start": "0:59",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Long before Europeans arrived, the land was home to many diverse indigenous groups. In the west, the Arawak people settled the region, while the Carib dominated the east.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Animated map of Venezuela: the western region shades in to label 'Arawak', the eastern region shades in to label 'Carib'. Coastline, the Orinoco, and Lake Maracaibo subtly drawn. Editorial cartography, muted earth tones.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "custom",
          "params": {
            "description": "Animated map of Venezuela showing the Arawak (west) and Carib (east) territorial split, with Orinoco river and Lake Maracaibo annotated. Muted earth-tone editorial cartography.",
            "regions": [
              {"name": "Arawak", "side": "west"},
              {"name": "Carib", "side": "east"}
            ],
            "note": "no built-in template — needs custom render or replan as image"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_012",
        "start": "1:07",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "These societies had their own distinct languages and traditions, and their farming practices shaped the landscape long before the modern era.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal historical reconstruction: pre-Columbian Arawak / Carib villagers tending terraced cassava and maize plots at the edge of a tropical riverbank. No anachronisms; respectful, observational framing.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic historical reconstruction of a pre-Columbian indigenous Arawak village in what is now Venezuela, families tending terraced cassava and maize plots on a riverbank near tropical forest, traditional thatched dwellings, soft golden hour light, observational wide shot, 35mm documentary aesthetic, no text, respectful and dignified framing"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_013",
        "start": "1:15",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But everything changed with the arrival of Spanish colonizers.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal period image: Spanish galleons anchored off the Venezuelan coast in the early 16th century, conquistadors disembarking onto the shore. Painterly cinematic light, ominous tone.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic period painting style, early 16th century Spanish galleons anchored off the Venezuelan Caribbean coast, conquistadors in steel cuirass and morion helmets disembarking onto a sand beach, palm trees and tropical mountains in the distance, overcast moody sky, ominous tone, oil painting realism, 35mm wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_014",
        "start": "1:22",
        "duration": "8s",
        "narration_excerpt": "After centuries of colonial rule, a spirit of independence began to sweep across South America.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Timeline graphic advances: a sweep from 1500s colonial Spain through the early 1800s, with country labels igniting one by one across South America to mark the independence wave. Editorial illustrative style.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "Independence Sweeps South America",
            "events": [
              {"year": "1500s", "label": "Spanish colonial rule"},
              {"year": "1810", "label": "Independence movements begin"},
              {"year": "1820s", "label": "Independence wave across South America"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_015",
        "start": "1:30",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Venezuela became a central player in that fight, led by the legendary Simón Bolívar.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal period portrait of Simón Bolívar in early-1820s military dress, set against a backdrop of his Andean campaign. Lower-third orientation card: 'Simón Bolívar — Liberator who led the independence campaigns of the 1810s–20s'.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic period portrait of Simón Bolívar in early 19th century military dress uniform with high collar and gold epaulets, holding a sabre, set against a backdrop of misty Andean mountains and his independence campaign, oil painting realism, dramatic side lighting, dignified heroic but historically accurate, 50mm portrait, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_016",
        "start": "1:39",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "After years of intense struggle, the country officially declared its independence from Spain in 1821, forever cementing Bolívar as a national hero.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal historical battle image: the 1821 Battle of Carabobo — Venezuelan patriot cavalry charging across an open plain, banners aloft. Painterly cinematic, smoke-streaked light.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic historical battle painting, 1821 Battle of Carabobo, Venezuelan patriot cavalry in early 19th century uniforms charging across an open llanos plain with the tricolor flag aloft, smoke and dust streaked light, distant Spanish royalist lines, painterly oil realism, dramatic wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_017",
        "start": "1:48",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Independence promised a new beginning, but the nation's path was about to be reshaped by a new economic reality.",
        "visual_type": "graphic",
        "visual_description": "Timeline graphic plants a milestone marker '1821 — Independence' on the spine, then the line advances into the late 19th and early 20th centuries while a small oil-derrick icon appears at the far right, hinting at what's coming.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "timeline",
          "params": {
            "title": "From Independence to Oil",
            "events": [
              {"year": "1821", "label": "Independence"},
              {"year": "Late 1800s", "label": "Agrarian republic"},
              {"year": "Early 1900s", "label": "Oil discovery looms"}
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_018",
        "start": "1:55",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "In the early 20th century, Venezuela's story took a dramatic turn. The discovery of massive oil reserves transformed the country from a simple farming society into an economy almost entirely dependent on petroleum exports.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Photoreal early-20th-century scene: the first wooden derricks rising over Lake Maracaibo, sepia-tinged with workers in period dress watching the first gusher. Painterly documentary realism.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic early 20th century historical image of the first wooden oil derricks rising over Lake Maracaibo Venezuela circa 1920s, oil workers in period work clothes watching a gusher, sepia warm color grade, painterly documentary realism, wide shot, no text"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_019",
        "start": "2:04",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "While this shift initially brought a lot of wealth, it also created the very challenges that would define Venezuela's future.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Modern footage of Venezuelan refineries and pipeline corridors: industrial scale, golden hour, the country's economic spine made visible.",
        "search_query": "Venezuela oil refinery pipeline industrial petroleum economy infrastructure aerial",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_020",
        "start": "2:11",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Eventually, this one commodity would come to influence almost every part of life in the country.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Caracas everyday life intercut with oil-economy markers: gas stations, fuel-subsidy queues, workers' boots on refinery floors — oil's reach into ordinary life.",
        "search_query": "Caracas daily life gas station fuel subsidy oil dependent economy Venezuela",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      }
    ],
    "Thesis": [
      {
        "id": "scene_021",
        "start": "2:18",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "On paper, Venezuela should be incredibly wealthy.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
        "visual_description": "Symbolic composition: a tilting oil derrick towering over a Caracas skyline, the structure casting a long shadow that splits the city into two unequal halves. Cinematic, photoreal, no caricature.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "Cinematic photorealistic symbolic composition, an oversized oil derrick tilting over a Caracas skyline at dusk, the derrick's long shadow stretching across the city and splitting it into two unequal halves of light and dark, melancholy mood, painterly editorial, wide shot, no text, no people"
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_022",
        "start": "2:25",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "But the reality is a society split right down the middle. In this video, we're exploring the root causes of that paradox.",
        "visual_type": "b-roll",
        "visual_description": "Side-by-side Caracas footage: an upscale Las Mercedes street and a Petare hillside barrio, intercut at a steady rhythm. The split feels structural, not editorial.",
        "search_query": "Caracas Las Mercedes Petare barrio rich poor neighborhood divide inequality",
        "comfyui_prompt": ""
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_023",
        "start": "2:34",
        "duration": "9s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Here is the key insight: these deep divisions stem from a complex mix of historical factors, flawed economic choices, and clashing political ideologies.",
        "visual_type": "text-overlay",
        "visual_description": "Cadence card. Header in small caps: 'KEY INSIGHT'. Body, in editorial serif: 'Three forces — history, economics, ideology — fueled the fracture.' First of the four 'key insight' beats; held over a softly defocused background.",
        "search_query": "",
        "comfyui_prompt": "",
        "layout_spec": {
          "template": "title",
          "params": {
            "title": "KEY INSIGHT",
            "subtitle": "Three forces — history, economics, ideology — fueled the fracture."
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "id": "scene_024",
        "start": "2:43",
        "duration": "7s",
        "narration_excerpt": "Together, these forces have fueled years of instability.",
        "visual_type": "generated-image",
